subject: Implement readiness in go
commit_message:
Implement readiness in go

- go is statically compiled and thus much
  faster to launch
- smaller image size (109MB -> 42MB)
- distroless base image, thus having no
  OS level dependencies that could become vulnerable
- move old python implementation into readiness-python folder
- bump version to 7.0.0

Issue-ID: INT-2331
Change-Id: Iac30fbed7acdf4d5001e36292035ff6726cc9a87
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
